Represents in memory appointment repository in the system.

Represents in-memory waitlist persistence in the system.

Checks whether admin is true.
isAvailable() - Method in class org.example.domain.AppointmentSlot
Checks whether available is true.
isBooked() - Method in class org.example.domain.AppointmentSlot
Checks whether booked is true.
isFeedbackSubmitted() - Method in class org.example.domain.Appointment
Checks whether feedback was already submitted.
isFutureComparedTo(LocalDateTime) - Method in class org.example.domain.Appointment
Checks whether future compared to is true.
isFutureComparedTo(LocalDateTime) - Method in class org.example.domain.AppointmentSlot
Checks whether this slot is future compared to reference time.
isFutureSlot() - Method in class org.example.domain.AppointmentSlot
Checks whether this slot is future based on current time.

Checks whether locked is true.
isLocked() - Method in class org.example.service.AuthenticationAttemptResult
Checks whether locked is true.
isLocked() - Method in class org.example.service.LoginAttemptTracker
Checks whether locked is true.
isLoggedIn() - Method in class org.example.service.SessionManager
Checks whether logged in is true.
isSuccess() - Method in class org.example.service.AuthenticationAttemptResult
Checks whether success is true.
isSuccessLike(BookingStatus) - Static method in class org.example.presentation.gui.GuiMessageHelper
Checks whether status should be treated as a non-error user outcome.

Checks whether user is true.

Checks whether valid is true.

Checks whether the appointment satisfies assessment rules.

Checks whether valid is true.

Checks whether valid is true.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.FollowUpRule
Checks whether the appointment satisfies follow-up rules.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.GroupRule
Checks if a group appointment has enough participants.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.IndividualRule
Checks whether the appointment satisfies individual rules.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.InPersonRule
Checks whether the appointment satisfies in-person rules.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.NormalRule
Checks whether the appointment satisfies the normal rule.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.ParticipantRule
Checks whether valid is true.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.UrgentRule
Checks if an urgent appointment stays within the max duration.
isValid(Appointment) - Method in class org.example.service.VirtualRule
Checks whether the appointment satisfies virtual appointment rules.
